item.name: Hells' Cap
item.description:
This flat, disc-shaped fish can be found in the hottest parts of the Ruby Sea.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: These circular wavekin have a tendency to cluster around the hydrothermal vents near Hells' Lid, thus giving rise to their name. As the waters can reach several hundred degrees, however, their ability to actually cap said Hells is limited by the unfortunate realities of being flesh rather than stone.
